json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete six mathematics courses as follows:

options.title: Mathematics
options.description: Select three courses from the following, one of which must be 115B, 131B, 151B, or 170B:
courses: MATH 134 - Linear and Nonlinear Systems of Differential Equations

options.title: Core
courses: A&O SCI 101 - Fundamentals of Atmospheric Dynamics and Thermodynamics

options.title: Elective
courses: A&O SCI C110 - Advanced Dynamic and Synoptic Meteorology
A&O SCI M120 - Introduction to Fluid Dynamics
A&O SCI C144 - Atmospheric Boundary Layer
A&O SCI C160 - Remote Sensing of Atmosphere and Oceans
A&O SCI C170 - Introduction to Solar System Plasmas
A&O SCI 180 - Numerical Methods in Atmospheric Sciences

options.title: Capstone Senior Projects/Thesis
